name: Good Reasons Italian Dressing Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Lipton Cup-A-Soup Cream of Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and press through a fine mesh sieve with the back of a large spoon.
2. Store covered in an airtight container and use within 4-5 months.
3. For use: Combine 2 tablespoons of mix with 1/4 cup vinegar, 2/3 cups oil, and 2 tablespoons water. Vigorously shake the mixture.
4. Makes 1 cup. NOTES: ( Use 1 envelope of the soup mix or 2 square soda crackers well crushed plus 1.5 teaspoons chicken bouillon powder plus 1 teaspoon non-dairy creamer powder.
